name: Material line with qty × unitCost ≠ totalCost
description: Pre-baked Sonnet analysis has a material line where quantity=2, unitCost=£100, but totalCost=£500 — a £300 arithmetic error. The critique prompt's rule #11 (Line-item arithmetic) must catch this. Severity should be high — a £300 silent overcharge per line item is exactly the kind of trust-destroying error the critique exists to catch.
briefNotes: Two-metre breach in a gritstone field wall. Stone mostly reclaimable.

analysis.damageDescription: A 2m breach has opened up in this double-faced gritstone field wall. Standing sections either side are sound.

labourEstimate.calculationBasis: 2.4 sqm wall face at ~1 sqm/hour each, 2 wallers

scheduleOfWorks.title: Site clearance
scheduleOfWorks.description: Clear debris and sort reclaimable stone

scheduleOfWorks.title: Rebuild
scheduleOfWorks.description: Rebuild the 2m breach double-faced with through stones every 600-900mm of height

scheduleOfWorks.title: Cope and finish
scheduleOfWorks.description: Set coping stones and tidy site
